label: Pika
description: Generate AI-powered videos from text prompts or images using Pika's creative video model.

form.title: Connect Pika
form.subtitle: Paste your Pika API key to start generating AI videos from Anton.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your Pika API key from pika.art → Developers. Simplest and recommended path once API access is granted.
methods.how_to:
## Connect with a Pika API Key

Pika's API is currently in limited early access (waitlist). Once your account is approved, you can generate a key from the developer settings.

### Steps

1. Log in to [pika.art](https://pika.art).
2. Click your profile avatar or navigate to **Settings → Developers** (or the **API** tab if available in your plan).
3. Click **Generate API Key** (or **Create new key**).
4. Copy the key shown — it may only be displayed once. Store it somewhere safe.
5. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below.

### Notes

- If you don't see the Developers section yet, your account is still on the waitlist. Join at [pika.art](https://pika.art) and wait for approval.
- Keep your API key private — anyone with the key can generate videos against your quota.
- To revoke access, return to **Settings → Developers** and delete or regenerate the key.

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found at pika.art → Settings → Developers. API access is currently waitlisted.
